channel.title: Computer Incident Response Center Luxembourg (CIRCL) — recent CVEs
channel.description: Most recent CVEs assigned by Computer Incident Response Center Luxembourg (CIRCL) (circl).

image.title: Computer Incident Response Center Luxembourg (CIRCL) — recent CVEs

item.title: CVE-2026-54398 · 5.3 MEDIUM — MISP object edit authorization bypass allows unauthorized sharing group assignment
item.description: An authorization flaw in MISP’s object add/edit handling allowed an authenticated user with object editing permissions to assign a MISP object, or attributes contained within an object, to a sharing group that the user was not authorized to use or vi…

item.title: CVE-2026-54397 · 6.1 MEDIUM — MISP event editing allows unauthorized assignment to undisclosed sharing groups
item.description: A vulnerability in MISP’s non-REST event editing path allowed an authenticated user with event edit permissions to manipulate the submitted form data and set an event’s sharing_group_id to a sharing group they were not authorized to use. When distrib…

item.title: CVE-2026-54396 · 5.3 MEDIUM — MISP AuthKey edit endpoint allows authenticated user email enumeration
item.description: An information disclosure vulnerability exists in the MISP AuthKey edit functionality. When a validation error occurs during an AuthKey edit request, the user dropdown was populated using the attacker-controlled AuthKey.user_id value from the submitt…

item.title: CVE-2026-54395 · 5.3 MEDIUM — MISP UiBeta event index reflected XSS in advanced filter popup
item.description: MISP contains a reflected cross-site scripting vulnerability in the UiBeta event index view. The urlparams value is inserted into an inline JavaScript handler using HTML escaping inside a single-quoted JavaScript string. Because browsers HTML-decode…

item.title: CVE-2026-54394 · 5.3 MEDIUM — MISP organisation logo path traversal allows retrieval of arbitrary PNG/SVG files
item.description: MISP contains a path traversal vulnerability in OrganisationsController::getOrgLogo. The vulnerable code builds organisation logo file paths using organisation-controlled fields such as id, name, and uuid without ensuring that the resolved file remai…

item.title: CVE-2026-54393 · 5.1 MEDIUM 🌩️ — MISP Overmind theme stored XSS via unvalidated homepage setting
item.description: A stored cross-site scripting vulnerability exists in MISP when the Overmind theme is used. The setHomePage endpoint previously saved the user-controlled path value through setSettingInternal(), bypassing the normal setSetting() validation logic, inc…

item.title: CVE-2026-54362 · 5.3 MEDIUM — MISP template builder exposes non-visible custom galaxies across organisations
item.description: An incorrect visibility condition in the MISP event template builder allowed authenticated non-site-admin users to view galaxies that should not have been visible to their organisation. The custom access-control condition intended to restrict galaxie…

item.title: CVE-2026-54361 · 8.8 HIGH 🌩️ — MISP mass assignment vulnerabilities allow unauthorized modification of ownership and delegation records
item.description: MISP contained multiple mass assignment vulnerabilities in the handling of collections, tag collections, event delegations, and shadow attributes. Several controller actions accepted user-supplied fields that should have remained server-controlled, i…

item.title: CVE-2026-54360 · 8.4 HIGH — MISP sharing group creation mass assignment allows unauthorized takeover of existing sharing groups
item.description: A mass assignment vulnerability exists in MISP’s sharing group creation endpoint. When creating a new sharing group, the controller did not remove a user-supplied id field before saving the submitted data. In CakePHP, supplying a primary key in the s…

item.title: CVE-2026-54359 · 7.1 HIGH 🌩️ — MISP automation endpoints may be exposed to CSRF when Sec-Fetch-Site protection is disabled by default
item.description: MISP contains an insecure default configuration in which the Security.check_sec_fetch_site_header control is disabled. When this setting is disabled, state-changing requests such as POST, PUT, or AJAX requests are not restricted based on the browser-…

item.title: CVE-2026-54358 · 7.5 HIGH — MISP organization administrators can target site administrator accounts for password reset
item.description: An incorrect authorization vulnerability in MISP allows an organization administrator to target site administrator accounts belonging to the same organization through the administrative email functionality. The affected code restricted organization a…

item.title: CVE-2026-54357 · 5.1 MEDIUM — MISP improper authorization allows organization administrators to modify site administrator user settings
item.description: An improper authorization vulnerability in MISP allowed an authenticated organization administrator to access or modify user settings belonging to site administrator accounts within the same organization. The affected access-control checks scoped adm…

item.title: CVE-2026-53912 · 5.1 MEDIUM — Cerebrate self-registration password hash exposure via inbox and audit log views
item.description: Cerebrate before version 1.37 exposed credential material from self-registration requests. The self-registration workflow stored the registrant’s hashed password in the inbox message data payload. This payload was returned unredacted through inbox in…

item.title: CVE-2026-53911 · 6.3 MEDIUM — Cerebrate primary key mass assignment in CRUD edit operations allows authenticated users to overwrite unrelated records
item.description: Cerebrate before version 1.37 allowed the id primary key field to be supplied through request input during CRUD edit operations and certain custom entity patching flows. In affected entities that did not explicitly mark id as inaccessible, an authent…

item.title: CVE-2026-53901 · 8.7 HIGH 🌩️ — Cerebrate before v1.37 allows mass assignment of record identifiers during object creation
item.description: Cerebrate before version 1.37 contains a mass-assignment vulnerability in the generic CRUD add path. The add() handler attempted to remove an attacker-supplied id from $params before normalizing the request through __massageInput(). Because the norma…

item.title: CVE-2026-53694 · 7.3 HIGH — Potential local privileges escalation through argument injection in the nxchmod.sh script
item.description: Improper Neutralization of Argument Delimiters in a Command ('Argument Injection') vulnerability in Nomachine allows Argument Injection.This issue affects Nomachine: before 9.5.7, before 8.23.2.

item.title: CVE-2026-53693 · 6.9 MEDIUM 🌩️ — MISP BSimVis stored cross-site scripting in tag and cluster rendering paths via unescaped tag metadata and UI labels
item.description: A stored cross-site scripting vulnerability existed in MISP BSimVis tag rendering code. Several client-side rendering paths interpolated tag names, collection names, entity identifiers, cluster names, and tag metadata directly into HTML, HTML attribu…

item.title: CVE-2026-10868 · 9 CRITICAL 🌩️ — MISP user edit endpoint mass assignment vulnerability allows unauthorized user account modification
item.description: A mass assignment vulnerability exists in the MISP user edit functionality due to insufficient filtering of user-supplied fields in UsersController::edit(). When processing edit requests, the application accepted a user-controlled User.id value from…

item.title: CVE-2026-10864 · 5.3 MEDIUM — MISP Dashboard widget field selection may expose restricted user and organisation data
item.description: A vulnerability in the MISP dashboard widgets allowed an authenticated user to manipulate the fields option and influence which fields were returned by the New Users and New Organisations widgets. In some cases, requesting a field set that became emp…

item.title: CVE-2026-10863 · 6.4 MEDIUM — MISP User-controlled order parameter in correlations over-correlation endpoint
item.description: A security issue was fixed in the correlations over-correlation endpoint where the order query parameter was accepted from user-controlled named request parameters. This allowed an authenticated user to override the server-defined ordering of over-co…

item.title: CVE-2026-10860 · 7.9 HIGH 🌩️ — MISP CRUDComponent delete validation bypass via operator precedence error
item.description: A logic error in the MISP CRUD component delete handler allowed validation failures to be bypassed when requests used the HTTP DELETE method. Due to missing parentheses in the delete condition, the expression was evaluated as ($validationError === nu…

item.title: CVE-2026-10861 · 5.1 MEDIUM 🌩️ — MISP post-login open redirect via pre_login_requested_url
item.description: An open redirect vulnerability existed in MISP UsersController::routeafterlogin() because the value stored in the pre_login_requested_url session key was used as the post-login redirect destination without sufficiently enforcing that it was a local a…

item.title: CVE-2026-10856 · 5.1 MEDIUM — Open redirect in MISP dashboard button widget URL handling
item.description: A URL validation flaw in the MISP dashboard button widget allowed a crafted relative-looking URL to be accepted as a local path while being interpreted by browsers as an external URL. The validation rejected URLs containing an explicit scheme, host,…

item.title: CVE-2026-10855 · 5.1 MEDIUM — MISP Event template importer authorization bypass
item.description: An authorization flaw existed in the MISP Event Template Importer overwrite workflow. When importing an event template in overwrite mode, the application checked whether a matching template already existed but did not verify that the importing user b…

item.title: CVE-2026-10854 · 5.3 MEDIUM — Unauthorized exposure of private galaxies in MISP event template creation
item.description: A visibility control issue in the event template creation workflow allowed non-site-admin users to access private galaxies belonging to other organisations. The event template builder loaded all enabled galaxies without applying organisation or distr…

item.title: CVE-2026-10611 · 8.2 HIGH 🌩️ — OTP bypass via plugin-based LDAP authentication in MISP when LDAP mixed authentication is enabled
item.description: An authentication bypass vulnerability exists in MISP when LDAP mixed authentication is enabled with OTP enforcement. In deployments configured with LdapAuth.mixedAuth=true and Security.require_otp=true, users authenticated through an authentication…

item.title: CVE-2026-9813 · 6.2 MEDIUM — FlowIntel external reference URL probe allows server-side request forgery
item.description: FlowIntel up to version 3.3.0 contains a server-side request forgery (SSRF) vulnerability in the external reference URL probe functionality in app/case/task.py. An attacker who can submit an external reference URL can cause the application server to…

item.title: CVE-2026-9806 · 6.3 MEDIUM 🌩️ — Stored Cross-Site Scripting (XSS) in CTI Transmute Notification Panel via Malicious Convert Names
item.description: A stored cross-site scripting (XSS) vulnerability exists in the notification panel of CTI Transmute in versions prior to the patched release. Notification messages containing user-controlled convert names were rendered in the notification bell dropdo…

item.title: CVE-2026-9137 · 5.1 MEDIUM 🌩️ — CSP Report Endpoint Log Flooding in MISP via Incorrect Size Limit
item.description: The CSP report endpoint in MISP intended to limit logged CSP reports to 1 KB but incorrectly allowed reports up to 1 MB before truncation. On deployments where the endpoint is reachable by untrusted clients, this could allow attackers to generate exc…

item.title: CVE-2026-9136 · 8.3 HIGH — Unauthorized ShadowAttribute modification in MISP via client-supplied identifier
item.description: A vulnerability was identified in the ShadowAttribute proposal creation workflow. The add action accepted user-controlled ShadowAttribute request data without removing the id field before saving the record. Because the underlying framework treats a s…

item.title: CVE-2026-9084 · 6 MEDIUM — MISP OIDC authentication bypass via automatic email-based account linking under insecure IdP configurations
item.description: MISP’s OIDC authentication plugin allowed automatic linking of an OIDC identity to an existing local user account based on the email claim when the local account had no stored sub value. Under insecure or untrusted IdP configurations where email owne…

item.title: CVE-2026-8080 · 6.8 MEDIUM — MISP core - Stored XSS in MISP template (old engine) element attribute type
item.description: Improper Neutralization of Input During Web Page Generation (XSS or 'Cross-site Scripting') vulnerability in misp allows Stored XSS. This issue affects MISP before 2.5.37. A stored cross-site scripting vulnerability exists in the template element att…
